editionStmt.p: The initial version of this file was created from data kindly provided by the Ethiopic Manuscript Imaging Project directed by Steve Delamarter.

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Supplication for the Travelers, በእንተ: እለ: ይነግዱ:
Supplication for the Rain, በእንተ: ዝናማት:
Supplication for the Crops: በእንተ: ፍሬ: ምድር:
Supplication for Springs of Water, በእንተ: ማያተ: አፍላግ:
Supplication for the King, በእንተ: ንጉሥ:
Supplication for the Sick, በእንተ: ዱያን:
Supplication for the Travelers, በእንተ: እለ: ይነግዱ:
Supplication for the Rain, በእንተ: ዝናማት:
Supplication for the Crops: በእንተ: ፍሬ: ምድር:
Supplication for Springs of Water, በእንተ: ማያተ: አፍላግ:
Supplication for the Catacumens: በእንተ: ንዑሰ: ክርስቲያን:
Supplication for Thanksgiving, መስተብቍዕ፡ እንዘ፡ ነአኵቶ፡
Instructions and Regulations for the Priests regarding the liturgy
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ህሉና፡ ሥሉስ፡ በኅብረት ወዕሪና፡ በትሥልስት፡ አቀድም፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሎቱ፡ ስብሐት፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ ዘይደሉ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ቅኔ፡ መልእተ፡ ክህነት፡ ዘይተፈቀድ፡ በውስተ፡ ጸሎታት፡ ወቀዳስያት፡

msItem.title: Ṣalota kidān
msItem.incipit: ኪዳን፡ ዘነግህ። ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር፡ ቅዱስ፡ ኃያል። ። ። ቅዱስ፡ ሕያው፡ ዘኢይመውት፡

msItem.title: Litanical Prayer for the Evening, አምላክነ
Supplication for the Miracle of Mary, መስተብቍዕ፡ ዘተአምር፡
msItem.incipit: እግዚአብሔር፡ እግዚኦ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ አምላክነ። ዘትቤሎሙ፡ ለፍቁርከ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎከ፡ በዲበ፡ ዕፀ፡ መስቀል፡ ቅዱስ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for Saint Mary, ለንግሥተ፡ ኵልነ፡
Supplication for the Reading of the Miracle of the Virgin, መስተብቁዕ፡ ዘተአምረ፡ ማርያም፡
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዓ፡ ለነቅዓ፡ ሕይወት፡ ለቅድስት፡ ደብተራ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the Cross, ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለዕፀ፡ [ቅዱስ፡] መስቀል፡
Order of the Egyptians, ሥርዓተ፡ ግብጽ፡
Prayer Over the Cup, ጸሎት፡ ላዕለ፡ ጽዋዕ፡
Prayer Over the Cross Spoon, ጸሎት፡ ላዕለ፡ ዕርፈ፡ መስቀል፡
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Śǝrʿāta qǝddāseሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡
msItem.incipit: ወይበሉ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሕዝ፡ በዜማ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ለብሶ፡ ካህን፡ በ፩። ሃሌ፡ ሉያ፡ እመቦ፡ ብእሲ፡ እምእመናን፡ ዘቦአ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ሚመጠን፡ ዛቲ፡ ዕለት፡ ግርምት፡ ወዕፅብት፡ ዛቲ፡ [ሰዓት፡] እንተ፡ ባቲ፡ ይወርድ፡ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ እመልእልተ፡ ሰማያት፡
msItem.note: incomplete at the end

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Dioscorus (same as LIT3180Anapho)
msItem.note: Excerpt from Anaphora by Dioscorus of Alexandria, or ʾAkkʷateta qʷǝrbān za-ʾEṗifānyos, from another book. : excerpt : excerpt

msItem.title: Gǝbra ḥawāryāt
msItem.note: Reading from Acts of the Apostles, from another book

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Śǝrʿāta qǝddāseሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡
msItem.note: Excerpt of reading from Ordinary of the Mass, from another book

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora of the Apostlesቅዳሴ፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ (same as LIT1104Anapho)
msItem.note: Last part of the Anaphora of the Apostles, with musical notation, from this book

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Śǝrʿāta qǝddāseሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡
msItem.note: Continuation of Excerpt of reading from Ordinary of the Mass, from another book

msItem.title: Excerpt from Office Prayers
msItem.note: (upside down): Excerpt from Office Prayers, from this book

msItem.title: Communion Instructions for Pointing (እማሬ፡), for Breaking the Bread (ፍታቴ፡), and for Blessing (ቡራኬ፡)
msItem.note: continued on fol. 39r

msItem.title: ʾAkkʷateta qʷǝrbān za-qǝddus Hǝryāqos za-hagara Bǝhnǝsā
msItem.note: (the loose folio has been bound in reverse order): First two folios of Anaphora of Our Lady Mary attributed to Cyriacus of Bәhәnsa, (continued on fols. 74r, 74v, 75r, 75v, 76r, 76v, 77r, 77v, 78r, 78v, 79r, 79v, 80r, 80v, 81r, 81v, 82r, 82v, 83r.)

msItem.title: Gospel of John
msItem.note: Excerpt from the Gospel of John, chapter 20

msItem.title: Table Prayer, “We beseech you,” ሰአልናከ፡
msItem.incipit: ሰአልናከ፡ መሐሪ፡ ሰአልናከ፡ ፈጣሪ፡ ሰአልናከ፡ ከሃሊ፡ ዘኢትከልዕ፡ ወኢትትፈልጥ፡ የማንከ፡ የማነ፡ ምሕረት፡ የማነከ፡ የማነ፡ ሣህል፡

msItem.title: List of Feasts of the Apostles and Evangelists
Wangel za-Mātewos
msItem.note: Excerpt from Matthew, chapter 2

msItem.title: Gospel of John
msItem.note: Readings from John 1 and 19

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora of the Apostlesቅዳሴ፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ (same as LIT1104Anapho)
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Śǝrʿāta qǝddāseሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡
msItem.note: Two loose folios with excerpt from Ordinary of the Mass

msItem.title: Ṣalota kidān
msItem.note: (upside down)

msItem.title: Wangel za-Mātewos, Chp25
msItem.note: Reading from Matthew, chapter 25

msItem.title: Wangel za-Mātewos, Chp2
msItem.note: Reading from Matthew, chapter 2

msItem.title: Wangel za-Mātewos
msItem.note: Reading from Matthew and Luke and Mark about the inauguration of Holy Communion

msItem.title: Wangel za-Mātewos
msItem.note: Reading from Matthew, chapter 5, the Beautitudes

msItem.title: Asmat Prayer against leech (?)
msItem.incipit: አቀወርቅም፡ ፯ዜ፡ መልአከ፡ ሞርሞርዮን፡ ለፎድን፡ ሞቆዲን፡ ኢታብረደ፡ ዘእንጽሩ፡ ማ፡ በም፡ እ፡ በታቦተ፡ አ፡ አመሐልኩከ፡

msItem.title: Continuation of Instructions for the Service
msItem.note: regarding procession and the breaking of the bread, continued from fol. 28v

msItem.title: Wangel za-Luqās
msItem.note: Reading from Luke 1:39–56

msItem.title: Wangel za-Luqās
msItem.note: top five lines: Reading from Luke 21:12–19

msItem.title: Gospel of John
msItem.note: Reading from John 20:1–14

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Śǝrʿāta qǝddāseሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡
msItem.note: Excerpt from Ordinary of the Mass, specifically from Absolution of the Son, regarding peaceful holy things, incomplete at the beginning

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Śǝrʿāta qǝddāseሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡
msItem.note: Excerpt from Ordinary of the Mass, from the response and prayer for the reading of the Scriptures at the time of the liturgy

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora of the Apostlesቅዳሴ፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ (same as LIT1104Anapho)
msItem.note: Excerpt from prayer in the Anaphora of the Apostles, called, “And Keep them in Orthodox Faith,” ወዕቀቦሙ፡ በርትዕት፡ ሃይማኖት፡

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Jacob of Serug (same as LIT2404Tanseu)
Wangel za-Mātewos
msItem.note: Reading from Matthew 5:10–12 (column 1), followed by Reading from Matthew 25:36–42 (bottom of column 1–verso)

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Śǝrʿāta qǝddāseሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡
msItem.incipit: ቀዊሞ፡ ቅድመ፡ ምሥዋዕ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ፡ ዘተወከፍከ፡ መሥዋዕተ፡ አቡነ፡ አብርሃም፡
msItem.note: from Prayer before the Altar, through Prayer for the Holy Kiss

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora of the Apostlesቅዳሴ፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ (same as LIT1104Anapho)
msItem.note: with disjunctures between fols. 58v, and 59r, , between 59v, and 60r, , and between 60v, and 61r, . In 61r, 61v, 62r, 62v, 63r, the scribe has included variants for the prayer called, “Host of Angels for the Savior of the World,” ሠራዊተ፡ መላእክቲሁ፡ ለመድኃኔ፡ ዓለም፡

msItem.title: ʾAkkʷateta qʷǝrbān za-ʾǝgziʾǝna ʾIyasus Krǝstos
msItem.note: incomplete at the end

msItem.title: ʾAkkʷateta qʷǝrbān za-qǝddus Hǝryāqos za-hagara Bǝhnǝsā
msItem.note: incomplete at the beginning

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Dioscorus (same as LIT3180Anapho)
msItem.note: incomplete at the end

msItem.title: Gospel of John
msItem.note: Reading from John 6:47–57

msItem.title: First Epistle to the Corinthians
msItem.note: Reading from 1 Corinthians 11:23–8 about the institution of Holy Communion

msItem.title: First Epistle of Peter
msItem.note: Reading from 1 Peter 2:5–6

msItem.title: Gǝbra ḥawāryāt
msItem.note: Reading Acts 27:33–5, incomplete at the end, continued on fol. 89r

msItem.title: Gǝbra ḥawāryāt
msItem.note: Reading from Acts 23:1–11

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Jacob of Serug (same as LIT2404Tanseu)
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Śǝrʿāta qǝddāseሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡
msItem.incipit: እግዚአብሔር፡ ልዑል፡ ይባርከነ፡ ላዕለ፡ ኵልነ፡ ወይቀድሰነ፡ በኵሉ፡ በረከት፡ መንፈሳዊተ፡
msItem.note: (different hand): excerpt from Ordinary of the Mass, from the Prayer of Blessing before the Reading of the Gospel

collation.note: Quire descriptions: quires 1–6 balanced; quire 7 adjusted balanced.
Fols 25–46 have been reassembled and repaired using a stab stitch; quire divisions are impossible to determine.

list.item: 6 Fols 85–90 Folss. 87, 88, are loose folios that have been attached between 86, 89 with a stab stitch. Quire 7: 3 added 4 added

decoNote.desc: crude drawing of a figure with and

item.desc: Prayer to Mary, “Peace to You,” in a different hand. Text: ሰላም፡ ለኪ፡ እንዘ፡ ንሰግድ፡ በንግሥኪ፡ ንግሥተ አድኅኖ፡ ማርያም፡ ናስተበቍአኪ፡ ዕምአርዌ፡ ነአዊ፡ ተማኅፀነ[፡] ብኪ፡ በእንተ
Excerpt from the Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, from the Prayer for the Gospel Reading, copied in a different hand
The codex has been rebound in some disorder. In addition, several leaves from other books have been incorporated into the codex
mentions King Tewoflos (1708–11), in the middle of the second column
mentions the Yohannǝs (presumably, Archbishop of Alexandria, Yohannǝs XVI, 1676–1718) and a Marqos (presumably, Metropolitan Marqos IV, 1681–1716)

mentions Yohannǝs (presumably, Archbishop of Alexandria, Yohannǝs XVII, 1727–45) at the bottom of column one and at the top of column two, and also another Yohannǝs (presumably Metropolitan Yohannǝs III, 1736–61) later in column two

mentions Yohannǝs (presumably, Archbishop of Alexandria, Yohannǝs XVII, 1727–45) at the top of column two, and also another Yohannǝs (presumably Metropolitan Yohannǝs III, 1736–61) later in column two
The beginning of an Amharic letter of correspondence
words of text are written interlinearly;
lines of text are written interlinearly (19r, 21r, 88v); and in the upper margin with a symbol (+) marking the location where the text is to be inserted (2r; 20v; 42v);

binding.decoNote: Parchment, four Coptic chain stitches attached with bridle attachments to rough hewn wooden boards, both front and back covers have been broken from top to bottom, front cover has been repaired and back cover has been repaired in the past but is missing approximately a third of the board.

origin.origDate: 1682-1706 (fols. 4v, mentions King Tewoflos [1708–11]; 43r, , Archbishop of Alexandria, Yohannǝs XVI [1676–1718] and Metropolitan Marǝqos [1681–1716]; and 54r, King Iyasu I [19 July 1682–13 Oct 1706]).

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Created XML record from EMIP Collection Metadata.xsls
Added quire maps, margin dims, columns/lines, binding desc, dating info.
